narrative:
Precinct Piqua 1-A (precinct in Miami County) has 589 registered voters, with 72.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points.
